theme: Option B Phase 1 foundation + security hardening

items.title: Three Work Types Rule — enforce script/governance/LLM separation
items.note: Quick win. Defines when work routes to script vs governance agent vs LLM. Reduces unnecessary Sonnet/Haiku usage.

items.title: Sources of Truth Register — 10 core data types
items.note: Canonical storage location for each data domain. Prevents data fragmentation. Foundation for Phase 1.

items.title: Cloudflare Tunnel — MinIO + OpenClaw webchat
items.note: Secure external access to MinIO and webchat without exposing ports. P1 prerequisite for KL team.
